releaseNotes:
# DPX AppDock 1.0.2

Release date: 2026-05-31

Updater reliability and settings polish.

## In-app updates

- Update progress window can be **closed** (no longer stuck at 100%)
- Update errors appear **on top** of the progress UI
- Safer download/extract when a previous update package is still locked
- **Skipped updates:** checking again shows **Update now** instead of an info-only message
- **Install version X now** in Settings > About and the update banner

## UI

- Dock **context menu separator** aligned across the full menu width

## Install & update

- **Setup:** `DPX.AppDock-1.0.2-setup.exe`
- **In-app update package:** `DPX.AppDock-1.0.2-win-x64.zip`
- Publish instructions: [RELEASE.md](RELEASE.md)
